MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Northridge Cooperative Homes, Inc is present. Represented by Kevin Barr.
Attorney, David Briggs is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sosefina Ulai-Eli is present and appearing Limited Scope Attorney, Josephine Alioto.

The Judge Quidachay, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of October 09, 2012 is vacated.
